site.name: Noor al-Seerah
site.subtitle: The Light of the Biography
site.tagline: An interactive journey through the life of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ
site.description: Forty-nine key events from the life of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, drawn from authenticated Islamic sources.

timeline.title: The Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Forty-nine events across three eras, from 571 to 632 CE.
timeline.metaDescription: Explore the complete timeline of the life of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ across three eras.

about.title: About Noor al-Seerah
about.purposeBody: Noor al-Seerah is an interactive web experience for learning the life of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ. It presents forty-nine key events across three historical eras, drawn entirely from pre-verified content in authenticated Islamic sources.
about.methodologyBody: Events were identified using Ar-Raheeq Al-Makhtum as the primary chronological framework, cross-referenced with the major hadith collections, and verified against tafsir literature. Only sahih and hasan narrations are cited. Dates follow the majority scholarly opinion.
about.differencesBody: Some dates differ among scholars. This project follows the most commonly cited opinions in the sources listed above. Readers are encouraged to study under qualified scholars and consult original sources for deeper understanding.
about.sadaqahBody: This project is intended as sadaqah jariyah, an ongoing charity. We ask Allah to accept this effort and make it a source of benefit.

footer.verifiedNote: Content verified from authenticated Islamic sources

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist. It may have been moved, or the path may be incorrect.
